infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Babala sa Sakuna needs your location to show nearby disaster alerts and resources.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Babala sa Sakuna needs your location to send you timely disaster alerts even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Babala sa Sakuna needs camera access to let you take photos for community reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Babala sa Sakuna needs access to your photo library to attach images to reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Babala sa Sakuna may need microphone access for video reports.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Babala sa Sakuna to use your location to show nearby hazards and resources.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Babala sa Sakuna to send you timely disaster alerts based on your location.
